repoStrategy.boundaryRule: Eve core owns contracts; plugins own semantics; runtime repos own native projection; provider repos own live truth.
repoStrategy.incubationPolicy: Eve may host runtimes, plugins, and conformance packs only while their contract is still forming.

conformancePacks.exitCriteria: Stays in Eve; proves surface contract, CultUI DSL, bindings, commands, and embedded documents.
Moves when plugin semantics, fixtures, and conformance cases are stable.
Moves when fixture carries product-specific state, assets, flows, or receipts.
Moves when runtime has its own build/deploy lifecycle or platform SDK pressure.

providerAdvertisements.title: Repixelizer
providerAdvertisements.graduationTrigger: Provider-owned product state, assets, sessions, and receipts stay in Repixelizer; Eve keeps only the advertisement-shaped fixture.

providerAdvertisements.title: GameCult Compound VN
providerAdvertisements.graduationTrigger: Move this advertisement-shaped VN fixture to Sai when sai-vn-plugin owns VN/Ink semantics and conformance packs.

providerAdvertisements.title: Aetheria
providerAdvertisements.graduationTrigger: Aetheria owns RTS/ARPG world surfaces, generated level state, assets, command receipts, and scenario conformance; Eve keeps contract fixtures only.

providerAdvertisements.title: Generic Interactive World Smoke
providerAdvertisements.graduationTrigger: Stays in Eve core as the minimal non-product interactive-world control fixture.

pluginManifests.title: Sai Visual Novel
pluginManifests.graduationTrigger: Graduated: Sai owns retained Ink playback, fixtures, ABI sidecar, and release lifecycle.

pluginManifests.title: Norn Graph
pluginManifests.graduationTrigger: Graduated: Norn owns graph semantics, fixtures, ABI sidecar, and release lifecycle.

pluginManifests.title: TeX Math
pluginManifests.graduationTrigger: Graduated: EvePlugins owns the executable TeX sidecar, fixtures, tests, and conformance witness.

proofs.description: Provider picker consumes provider advertisements without Eve source-layout knowledge.
Conformance pack can be consumed without depending on Eve's local harness layout.
Flutter lifecycle evidence is declared and smoke-checked for EveFlutter incubation.

pendingProofs: Tagged EveFlutter release, test runner, and capture runners are owned by EveFlutter rather than Eve incubation.

proofs.description: Unity UI Toolkit package lifecycle is owned and tested from EveUnity.
Aetheria consumes tagged Unity packages released by EveUnity.
Unity scene runtime is owned by EveUnity and its owner-repo sources are present.
Unity scene lifecycle is owned and tested from EveUnity.
Aetheria daemon 3D ARPG world lowers through a generic EveUnity playable-world client without Aetheria runtime authority.
Unity scene graph projection lowerer plus Sai, Norn, and TeX projection adapters exist without claiming provider simulation, plugin semantics, or capture ownership.
EveElectron owner repository publishes the generic runtime package.
EveElectron owns secure window, preload, and generic CultMesh asset lifecycle.
Aetheria consumes EveElectron for generic window, preload, provider transport, renderer, and asset authority while retaining provider daemon lifecycle and provider-owned asset records.
EveTui lifecycle contract is machine-readable and smoke-checked.
EveTui provider-shell skeleton selects advertised surfaces, lowers Eve surface trees into terminal grids, and emits Eve command intents.

pendingProofs: TUI package release is cut from EveTui rather than Eve incubation.
TUI capture path is owned by EveTui rather than Eve incubation.

runtimes.title: Electron shell
runtimes.graduationTrigger: Graduated: the runtime body and package are owned here.

capture.note: EveElectron owns native window PNG production for the generic and Aetheria provider surfaces.

runtimes.title: Compact TUI
runtimes.graduationTrigger: Split when TUI has a provider-agnostic terminal/grid lowerer, provider advertisement consumption, command transport, terminal capability manifest, and transcript/cell-grid capture evidence.

contains: lowers provider surface trees into a terminal grid
lowers Sai, Norn, and TeX plugin surfaces into compact terminal fallbacks
rejects surface documents that do not match the advertised TUI target
builds TUI capture request from provider advertisement
builds TUI capture request from a declared generic world provider
rejects capture request when the surface does not advertise TUI
builds TUI JSON grid capture artifact
builds TUI JSON grid capture artifact from a generic world provider
builds EveTui release request from package manifest

capture.note: TUI attaches a provider-advertisement-backed gamecult.eve.tui_grid.v1 JSON capture artifact; packaged runtime ownership remains an EveTui split blocker.

runtimes.title: Unity / Scene
runtimes.graduationTrigger: Graduated: EveUnity owns the provider-agnostic Unity scene package, release lifecycle, runtime tests, and generic PlayMode capture. The Aetheria daemon product witness remains active lifecycle work.

capture.note: The released generic EveUnity client discovers and captures the separately running Aetheria daemon world.

releaseContract.publishProof: Tagged Unity scene package release is created from the EveUnity repository.

requiredPackageDependencies.purpose: Shared Unity DTOs for gamecult.eve.surface.v1 documents.

captureContract.authority: Capture observes Unity scene projection only; provider state, command acceptance, and receipts stay provider-owned.
captureContract.publishProof: Unity scene screenshot or frame-capture PNG artifact is attached to the runtime conformance report from EveUnity.

runtimes.title: Web reference
runtimes.graduationTrigger: Stay in Eve while it is the behavior oracle; split only if it becomes a deployable runtime product.

contains: preserves Sai required and optional nested plugin requirements from advertisement
merges generic world fixture transport with advertised world interaction

pendingProofs: Split to EveWeb only if the browser reference gains independent deployment and release lifecycle.

test.command: node --test web/*.test.mjs && npm --prefix packages/eve-browser-lowering test && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File .\scripts\run-parity-harness.ps1

capture.note: Chrome headless captures phone, tablet, and desktop PNGs through the provider query parameter.

runtimes.title: Windows / Flutter
runtimes.graduationTrigger: Graduated: EveFlutter owns Flutter projection, provider selection, command intents, platform builds, tests, and captures.

contains: emits a provider-routed Eve command intent

capture.note: Uses the Flutter parity golden smoke on the Windows host.

runtimes.title: Linux / Flutter
runtimes.graduationTrigger: Graduated: EveFlutter owns Linux build and capture lifecycle.

contains: emits a provider-routed Eve command intent

capture.note: Runs the Flutter parity golden smoke on Nightwing over SSH and pulls back phone, tablet, and desktop PNGs.

runtimes.title: iOS / UIKit
runtimes.graduationTrigger: Split when UIKit renderer has generic surface lowering, sensor edge release flow, and device CI independent of Eve core.

capture.note: SSH capture script foregrounds EveCanvas and requests latest-screenshot.png.

runtimes.title: Android / Flutter
runtimes.graduationTrigger: Graduated: EveFlutter owns Android APK, discovery, command, plugin projection, and capture lifecycle.

contains: emits a provider-routed Eve command intent

capture.note: Builds the shared Flutter parity APK, installs it on Periwinkle, and pulls responsive plus physical-panel screencaps through adb.

runtimes.title: Android / Kotlin device edge
runtimes.graduationTrigger: Split when Kotlin device edge has generic surface traversal, sensor release flow, and Android-specific CI.

capture.note: Native Kotlin preserves CultUI embedded document slots in its lightweight dashboard renderer; full responsive GUI capture still belongs to Android Flutter.

runtimes.title: Unity / UI Toolkit
runtimes.graduationTrigger: Graduated: EveUnity owns the UI Toolkit package, plugin projection adapters, package build, and Unity tests.

releaseContract.publishProof: Tagged UPM release is created from the EveUnity repo and references this package root.

requiredPackageDependencies.purpose: Shared Unity DTOs for gamecult.eve.surface.v1 documents.

managedAssemblyDependencies.resolutionMode: Unity precompiled reference during EveUnity incubation.

dependencyContract.unityResolution: EveUnity consumes this as a Unity precompiled reference during incubation.
dependencyContract.handoffRequirement: EveUnity split must resolve this through CultLib's NuGet/package feed or a documented Unity import without vendoring CultLib ownership into Eve.

managedAssemblyDependencies.resolutionMode: Unity precompiled reference during EveUnity incubation.

dependencyContract.unityResolution: EveUnity consumes this as a Unity precompiled reference during incubation.
dependencyContract.handoffRequirement: EveUnity split must resolve this through CultLib's NuGet/package feed or a documented Unity import without vendoring CultLib ownership into Eve.

managedAssemblyDependencies.resolutionMode: Unity precompiled reference during EveUnity incubation.

dependencyContract.unityResolution: EveUnity consumes this as a Unity precompiled reference during incubation.
dependencyContract.handoffRequirement: EveUnity split must resolve this through CultLib's NuGet/package feed or a documented Unity import without vendoring CultLib ownership into Eve.

captureContract.authority: Capture observes runtime projection only; provider state, command acceptance, and receipts stay provider-owned.
captureContract.publishProof: Unity editor or batchmode capture artifact is attached to the runtime conformance report from EveUnity.

pendingProofs: Unity batchmode or editor capture artifact attached to the runtime conformance report.

capture.note: Unity editor or batchmode PNG capture must be produced and attached by EveUnity; Eve does not manufacture a runtime proxy artifact.

runtimes.title: Fensalir Direct2D
runtimes.splitTarget: Fensalir or EveDirect2D if it earns a separate body
runtimes.graduationTrigger: Do not graduate until the Eve-to-AquariumUiDocument adapter and Direct2D frame capture exist.
runtimes.demotionReason: Fensalir has an external Aquarium.EveSurface adapter spike and a recorded gamecult.eve.surface.v1 adapter fixture, but Eve still has no Direct2D frame capture or runtime-owned command smoke.
activationCriteria: Fensalir runs recorded gamecult.eve.surface.v1 fixtures without provider-specific renderer knowledge.
Fensalir emits gamecult.eve.command_invocation.v1 intents through the advertised provider command boundary.
Direct2D capture artifacts are produced and attached to the parity report.

capture.note: External Fensalir adapter spike and recorded surface fixture exist; Eve still needs runtime-owned command smoke and Direct2D frame capture before this runtime can become active.
